settings.title: Unisex Fragrances for the Free Soul
settings.subtitle: Crafted with premium notes, designed to linger. Inspired by the raw, poetic landscapes of Ireland.

settings.title: The Essence of Amoura
settings.content: Amoura Fragrances bridges the gap between raw natural complexity and high-end sophistication. Our genderless blends are bottled at high concentrations to assure long-lasting wear. Handcrafted, cruelty-free, and proudly shipped from Ireland.
